title: SCHITEC Tug Toy for Dogs, Bungee Tug of War Rope Toys with Squeaky Sound for Small Medium Large Dog, Puppy Training Pull Toy for Exercise & Interactive Play Games
features: Christmas Tug Toy for Interactive Training: Designed for interactive tug-of-war games to exercise your pet and help release extra energy. Also ideal for chasing, fetching, retriever training and other indoor & outdoor play to improve agility and strengthen the relationship between you and your puppies.

Bungee Rope for Comfortable Tugging: The handle of the tug toy is made of high-quality nylon with inner elastic cord. The stretchy handle not only gives doggies more tug of war pleasure but also reduces stress of pulling, which protects your arm and makes tugging more comfortable.

Squeak Dog Toy for Extra Fun: With built-in squeaker, the toy makes a funny squeaky sound when dogs bite to attract dogs' attention and make playtime more exciting, perfect to keep them occupied and reduce boredom.

Various Textures & Sturdy Material: This bite pillow is made of mop-like textured chenille and stuffed with PP cotton, the tail is made of colorful polar fleece, multiple textures motivate and keep entertaining your pups. Soft fibers can also clean dogs’ teeth when they are chewing it. Thickened fabric and stronger stitching make it more durable for long-lasting play.

Gift for All Tuggers: The mop part is 7.9” x 3.6” and the flexible handle can be stretched from 30.3” to 35.5”, suitable for dogs of all breeds from small to large. Please note that this is a tug toy for interaction instead of a chew toy, and don’t let dogs chew the handle. Please feel free to contact us with any questions.
description: Product Description Tug of War Dog Toy - Four Options for You Interactive tug-of-war games stimulate dogs to chase, grab and drag, which helps exercise your dog and release extra energy. The toys are suitable for all tuggers from small to large, and can be used in various scenes from indoor activities to outdoor games. Bungee Rope Design Reduce stress of tugging and doesn’t hurt your arm like other tug toys. Make tugging more gentle and won’t yank puppy’s teeth out. Bungee effect makes tugging extra fun. Provide enough space between your dog's mouth and your hand. Built-in Squeaker Funny squeaky sound attracts dogs' attention and makes playtime more exciting, perfect to keep them occupied and reduce boredom. Comfortable Handle The easy-grip handle is made of durable nylon and soft cotton, which is strong yet comfortable. You won’t hurt your hands when tugging with your dog Mop Toy with Various Textures Mop-like chenille stuffed with PP cotton, plus colorful polar fleece tail, various textures motivate and keep entertaining your dogs. Durable Special Design Designed with rope that goes internally through the entire mop, making the toy sturdy and durable enough to withstand countless tug of war games. Dog Tug Toy (Chenille + Long Handle) Material: Nylon, Polar Fleece, Chenille, Stuffed with PP Cotton Length: 44-49.2 inches (stretchable) Please Note: This is a tug toy for interaction between you and your dogs. The mop part is for dogs and the handle is for you. This is not a chew toy. Please keep dogs under supervision while playing with the toys and don’t let dogs chew the handle.
